requirements.title: Validate spec structure
requirements.description: Given a spec directory, confirm it is a valid DAG with no orphans, no cycles, no broken references.

requirements.title: Compute merkle tree
requirements.description: Hash every node, store snapshots, diff against previous snapshots.

requirements.title: Deterministic output
requirements.description: Given the same spec state and snapshot, always produce the same diff, impact, and actions.

modules.name: Schema
modules.description: JSON Schema definitions for project.json and module.json.

modules.name: Merkle
modules.description: Hash tree, snapshots, diff, impact classification.
